title: Thai Stir-Fried Eggplant
description: A flavorful and spicy Thai-inspired stir-fry made with eggplant, a blend of herbs, and your choice of protein, all prepared in just a few minutes.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the protein of choice and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the garlic and ginger and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the Thai red curry paste and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the eggplant and cook for 3-4 minutes, until tender.
Add the savory sauce and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer for 2-3 minutes.
Garnish with fresh cilantro and serve over rice or noodles.
